heading: Step 1: Go to the  modal.
body:
- For the cluster you wish to perform outage testing, click
  the **...** button.

- Click **Test Resilience**.

- Select **Regional Outage**. Atlas displays a
  **Test Resilience** modal with the steps Atlas
  takes to simulate an outage event. To learn more, see
  [Simulate Regional Outage Process](test-outage-process).
